data.title: Matsui Securities Adopts Broadridge's JASDECPS on SaaS Platform, Transforming Securities Lending Business for Accelerated Growth
data.description: Matsui Securities Co., Ltd. has opted for Broadridge's Software as a Service (SaaS) to enhance operations and adapt to Japan's evolving market landscape. The company aims to boost efficiency by utilizing the JASDEC Processing Solution. This move comes as a strategic initiative towards streamlining securities lending operations. The development was announced in Tokyo on April 20, 2026.

data.title: Relativity to Establish Singapore Entity, Expanding APAC Footprint
data.description: In the upcoming fourth quarter, Relativity intends to form a new entity in Singapore as part of its strategy to strengthen its operations in Asia through local recruitment. The popularity of RelativityOne and Relativity aiR is on the rise among customers in the Asia-Pacific region, with a noticeable increase in the use of these tools to manage the growing volume of data and legal matters. This development was highlighted at RelFest Sydney, where the company...

data.title: Broadridge Schedules Webcast and Conference Call to Review Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR) has announced that it will unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026. A webcast and conference call to review these results are set to take place at 8:30 AM on the same day.

data.title: Earth Day Spotlight: Meet the Farmers and Artisans Building a More Sustainable Way to Travel
data.description: April 20, 2026 marks Earth Day in Singapore, emphasizing the crucial importance of environmental protection. Sustainability is a constant priority for many individuals beyond this annual event. Wang Zhirong and Zhang Jing stand out as examples, actively incorporating eco-friendly practices into their everyday routines.

data.title: PrairieSky Announces Results of the Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On April 20, 2026, PrairieSky Royalty Ltd, traded as PSK on the TSX, successfully conducted its annual general meeting in Calgary, Alberta. All resolutions presented at the meeting were approved by the shareholders.

data.title: NVIDIA unveils memory optimization for Jetson, freeing up 12GB for 10B parameter AI models on edge devices.
data.description: NVIDIA has unveiled new optimization techniques that can free up to 12GB of memory on Jetson devices. This enables the smooth running of multi-billion parameter Large Language Models (LLMs) on edge hardware. This advancement in optimization allows for more efficient operation of these powerful models on the edge, making them more accessible and practical for a wider range of applications.
